description:
Your custom soundboard for events and shows

Are you a radio presenter looking to liven up your show with sound effects? A sportscaster in need of a quick and easy way to play crowd noises during a broadcast? A tabletop gamer looking for a way to bring your campaigns to life with immersive sound effects? Look no further!

Our simple and intuitive interface makes it easy to play, pause, and loop sounds on the fly. So why wait? Download Podcast Soundboard today and take your audio experience to the next level.

Browse a massive library of over 500,000 sound effects provided by Voicy to level-up your audio projects.

Supports the following file formats: .mp3, .wav, .ogg, .webm, .wav, .flac

Perfect for your creative project:
- Tabletop games
- Radio
- Podcasting
- Conference calls
- Theater
- Sportscasting
- Religious services
- Gaming

Features:
- MIDI device support
- Trigger sounds by keyboard or mouse
- Flexible, responsive user interface
- Duck controls
- Import/export soundboard configuration
- Use multiple soundboards at once
- Volume controls at global, soundboard, and individual sound level
- Loop and multi-fire functionality
- Set the start/end time of tracks
- Upgrade versions of underlying libraries for stability.
- Ship universal Mac build instead of Rosetta.
- Stopped the web link from redirecting the desktop app to a webpage.
